# Summary

Current Codex config and MCP reference.

# Key facts

- User-scope config lives in `~/.codex/config.toml`.
- Project config can live in `.codex/config.toml`, and the docs say project config loads only when the project is trusted.
- MCP servers are configured inside `config.toml`.

# Refresh notes

- No public markdown source was found during this pilot; this cache is a normalized summary of the rendered docs page.
